changelog: Side-rail RIGHT-arrow navigation behaviour reverted byte-for-byte to v1.43.87 — the version you said was working perfectly. Discovery, Streaming Services, Collections, Genres, Years, and Themed rows all now use the v87 focus-group + restorer pattern, and the rail's RIGHT-arrow falls back to Compose's default 2D spatial focus search exactly as it did in v87.
Continue Watching is the default first home section when you have anything in progress (from v1.43.92) — survives reboots and syncs across devices via the existing SyncEngine.
Themes & Moods row sits above the Decades row on Home (from v1.43.91).
